text.paragraph:
FNBR 39408016 Date(s): 11/11/21 - 11/11/21
Virginia Mason Issaquah 100 NE Gilman Blvd Issaquah, WA 98027- US (425) 557-8000
Discharge Disposition: *Home (01)
Attending Physician: Soong MD, Derrick L
Encounter Type: Clinic -Z Office Visit

Location: DT LIN Allergy
Appointment Type: Allergy New

Appointment Date: 10/28/2025 08:00:00 AM

Location: UV Video Visit
Appointment Type: Ped Behavioral Video Visit New

tr.td:
albuterol (albuterol CFC free 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol)
Status: Ordered
Start Date: 9/22/25
2 Inhalation Oral Inhalation Every 4 Hours as needed cough, wheeze, or difficulty breathing; take with spacer. Refills: 0.
Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

beclomethasone (Qvar Redihaler 40 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol)
Status: Ordered
Start Date: 9/22/25
2 Inhalation Oral Inhalation Twice Daily. rinse mouth and throat after use. Refills: 0.
Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

Status: Ordered
Start Date: 8/28/23
1 Each Oral Inhalation One Time. As directed with MDI. Refills: 0.
Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

item.paragraph: Event Display: Ped Well Child Check

Soong MD, Derrick L: PERFORM
Event Display: Ped Well Child Check
Authored Date: 20211111163737-0800

Assessment/Plan
_
1. Well child visit
Growth and Development: Normal for age.
Immunizations: DTaP, IPV, MMR, Varicella.
Counseling on Nutrition, Behavior. Vitamin D supplementation
Anticipatory Guidance: Standard age appropriate handout given.
Reassured regarding early waking, can try putting him down earlier to ensure he is getting his rest.
Follow-up: Routine follow-up 1 year.
Ordered:
90460 State - Vacc/ Imm Admin/Counseling < 19 Years - Any Route, 1st/Only Comp, Each Vacc/Tox Admin
Encounter for immunization
Ordered:
KINRIX (DTaP-IPV)(diphtheria/pertussis,acel/tetanus/polio), 0.5 mL, inj susp, IM, ONCE, Routine, Start 11/11/2021 16:22:00 PST, Stop 11/11/2021 16:22:00 PST, Dx: Encounter for immunization
PROQUAD (MMRV) (measles/mumps/rubella/varicella virus vaccine), 0.5 mL, inj soln, SUB-Q, ONCE, Routine, Start 11/11/2021 16:22:00 PST, Stop 11/11/2021 16:22:00 PST, Dx: Encounter for immunization
Chief Complaint
WCC
History of Present Illness
Concerns:
Waking up earlier in the day.
NUTRITION: Drinking appropriate amount of milk. No concerns about weight or eating habits. Eats a good variety of foods.
DEVELOPMENT/BEHAVIOR: No concerns.
Development Screen:
Can your child balance and hop on one foot? YES
Does your child get dressed without help? YES
Can your child tell a story? YES
Can your child use words to express his or her feelings? YES
Does your child speak clearly all of the time? YES
Can your child draw a picture of a person? YES
CHILDCARE/PRESCHOOL: None, home with grandma.
ELIMINATION: Bowel movements are normal. Toilet-trained for daytime.
SLEEP: Sleeping through the night.
DENTITION: Brushing teeth.
MEDIA: Not greater than 1 hour/day.
VISION: No vision concerns.
HEARING: No hearing concerns.
SAFETY: No significant issues identified.
See scanned questionnaire for additional information.
Review of Systems
Pertinent systems reviewed and negative except as per HPI
Physical Exam
Vitals & Measurements
HR: 100(Pulse) BP: 100/62
WT: 14.40 kg BMI: 15.46
GEN APPEARANCE: Alert, engaging, pink, no apparent distress. Well developed. Well nourished.
HEENT:
Head: Normocephalic.
Eyes: B/L RR. Conjunctivae pink without discharge. Corneal light reflex symmetric. Extraocular muscles intact. Pupils equal, round, react to light and accommodation. Cover/uncover - test - normal alignment.
Ears: B/L normal canals. B/L tympanic membranes with normal landmarks; no erythema.
Nose: Clear. No discharge.
Mouth/throat: No oral lesions. The pharynx is without exudates or erythema. Dentition healthy.
NECK: Supple. No significant lymphadenopathy.
LUNGS: Clear to auscultation with equal breath sounds. No wheezes, rales or rhonchi.
HEART: Regular rate and rhythm. No murmur. Femoral pulse 2+ and equal.
ABDOMEN: Soft, nontender, normal bowel sounds. No hepatosplenomegaly. No masses.
GENITOURINARY: Normal genitalia. testes descended bilaterally, no hernia, no masses, tanner stage 1
SKIN: No rashes noted.
EXTREMITIES: UE - Normal ROM. LE Normal ROM.
NEUROLOGIC: Normal tone. Cranial nerves grossly intact. Motor/sensory grossly normal.
SPINE: Normal curvature with no defects or dimples.
External Vitals & Measurements
No qualifying data available.
Growth Percentiles
Event Name
Event Result
Date/Time
BMI Percentile
26-49%
11/11/21 16:13:00
Height Percentile
4-10%
11/11/21 16:13:00
Weight Percentile
11-24%
11/11/21 16:13:00
Hearing and Vision Screenings

Event Name
Event Result
Date/Time
Eye, Right Visual Acuity
Other: 20/32
11/11/21 16:12:00
Eye, Left Visual Acuity
Other: 20/32
11/11/21 16:12:00
Hearing Screen Results
Event Name
Event Result
Date/Time
Hearing Test
Attempted/Patient Unable to Complete
11/11/21 16:12:00
Problem List/Past Medical History
Ongoing
Abdominal pain
Birth mark Comments: forehead
Chromosomal microduplication
Hemangioma
Prematurity
Strabismus
Historical
No qualifying data
Medications
KINRIX (DTaP-IPV)(diphtheria/pertussis,acel/tetanus/polio), 0.5 mL, IM, ONCE
PROQUAD (MMRV) (measles/mumps/rubella/varicella virus vaccine), 0.5 mL, SUB-Q, ONCE
Vitamin D, Daily
Allergies
NKA
Social History
Home/Environment
Lives with Father, Mother, Siblings, Grandmother.
Family History
Allergies: Mother and Father.
Anxiety: Mother.
Depression: Mother.
Diabetes mellitus type 2: Sister.
Eczema: Father and Pat. GFather.
(Electronically Signed on 11/11/21 04:37 PM)
Soong MD, Derrick L
